ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "predicted_return" REAL /* Predicted return based on the analysis */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the predicted return */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model used for prediction */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "analysis_source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated stock */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the session */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total trading volume for the session */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total trading value for the session */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "trading_volume_change" REAL /* Change in trading volume from the previous session */,
  "trading_value_change" REAL /* Change in trading value from the previous session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
